steps.title: Use x = 0
steps.content:
The function is $h(x)=x+b$, and the problem gives $h(0)=52$. Substitute $x=0$:
$$h(0)=0+b=b$$

steps.title: Interpret the shortcut
steps.content: In $h(x)=x+b$, $b$ is also the value of the function when $x=0$, so the given y-intercept value directly gives $b$.
